name: Notebrain

releases.author: kiluahh
releases.description:
## Notebrain v0.1.0

Initial release.

### Features
- Inline AI chat with DeepSeek (Ctrl+Shift+Enter)
- 21 built-in tools
- FIM completion (+++ marker)
- Thinking mode
- Streaming responses
- Mobile compatible

### Requirements
- Obsidian 1.7.0+
- DeepSeek API key

[Full documentation](https://github.com/kiluahh/notebrain/blob/master/README.md)
